2603.19664.title: The Residual Stream Is All You Need: On the Redundancy of the KV Cache in Transformer Inference
2603.19664.paper_summary: The key-value (KV) cache is widely treated as essential state in transformer inference, and a large body of work engineers policies to compress, evict, or approximate its entries. We prove that this state is entirely redundant: keys and values at every layer are deterministic projections of the residual stream, and recomputing them from a single residual vector per token incurs exactly zero reconstruction error, not approximately, but bit-identically. We verify this across six models from four architecture families (135M to 4B parameters). Cross-task residual patching at every layer produces D_KL = 0 between patched and original output distributions, confirming that the residual stream satisfies a Markov property and is the sole information-carrying state. Removing the cache entirely and recomputing from scratch yields token-identical output under greedy decoding on all models tested. We build on this result with KV-Direct, a bounded-memory inference scheme that checkpoints residual vectors (5 KB per token on Gemma 3-4B) instead of full KV pairs (136 KB), recomputing keys and values on demand. Over 20 conversation turns, KV-Direct holds peak memory at 42 MB while the standard cache grows past 103 MB. Against five eviction baselines (H2O, StreamingLLM, SnapKV, TOVA, window-only), KV-Direct maintains 100% token match at every cache budget; all baselines degrade to 5-28%. A per-operation latency analysis shows recomputation runs up to 5x faster than reading cached tensors at moderate batch sizes. Code is available at https://github.com/Kaleemullahqasim/KV-Direct.
2603.19664.paper_summary_zh: 關鍵值 (KV) 快取被廣泛視為Transformer推理中的基本狀態，並且大量的研究工作設計政策來壓縮、驅逐或近似其條目。<lb/>我們證明這個狀態是完全多餘的：每一層的鍵和值都是殘差流的確定性投影，並且從每個標記的單一殘差向量重新計算它們所產生的重建誤差恰好為零，不是近似的，而是位元上完全相同的。<lb/>我們在四個架構系列的六個模型（135M 到 4B 參數）中驗證了這一點。<lb/>在每一層進行跨任務殘差修補時，修補後的輸出分佈與原始輸出分佈之間的 D_KL = 0，確認殘差流滿足馬爾可夫性質並且是唯一的信息承載狀態。<lb/>完全移除快取並從頭重新計算在所有測試的模型中都能在貪婪解碼下產生標記上完全相同的輸出。<lb/>我們在此結果的基礎上提出了 KV-Direct，一種有界內存推理方案，該方案檢查點殘差向量（每個標記 5 KB，在 Gemma 3-4B 上）而不是完整的 KV 對（136 KB），並按需重新計算鍵和值。<lb/>在 20 次對話回合中，KV-Direct 的峰值內存保持在 42 MB，而標準快取則增長超過 103 MB。<lb/>與五個驅逐基準（H2O、StreamingLLM、SnapKV、TOVA、僅窗口）相比，KV-Direct 在每個快取預算下保持 100% 的標記匹配；所有基準的匹配率降至 5-28%。<lb/>每次操作的延遲分析顯示，重新計算的速度比在中等批量大小下讀取快取張量快最多 5 倍。<lb/>代碼可在 https://github.com/Kaleemullahqasim/KV-Direct 獲得。
2603.19664.author: Kaleem Ullah Qasim et.al.
2603.19664.authors: Kaleem Ullah Qasim, Jiashu Zhang, Muhammad Kafeel Shaheen, Razan Alharith, Heying Zhang
